title: coryphantha orcuttii
intro: Coryphantha orcuttii, also known as the Orcutt's prickly pear or Orcutt's hedgehog cactus, is a species of cactus in the genus Coryphantha. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Coryphantha orcuttii include its ability to reduce fever, soothe burns, and alleviate skin conditions. Coryphantha orcuttii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, salves, and infusions, allowing for various applications in natural medicine.
